name: Alfreton Rural

locations.address:
Alfreton Safer Neighbourhood Teams,
Hall St,
Alfreton,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Crich, Whatstandwell, South Wingfield and Pentrich. It belongs to the Amber Valley Local Policing Unit.

The beautiful countryside attracts many walkers and tourists to the area and some of the places of interest are the Crich Tramway Museum, Crich Memorial Stand, and Wingfield Manor.
